title: Item Mapping - When a Status Changes to Something

posts.author: Jorgemolina (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Item mapping is a trigger output of “When a Status Changes to Something” in the built-in trigger. However, I do not received this itemMapping payload. Any suggestions Why?

link of the documentation : https://apps.developer.monday.com/docs/monday-trigger-blocks

posts.author: cartersingle (Carter Singletary)
posts.cookedHtml: @Matias.Monday I am also having this problem any updates here?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @cartersingle,

I will check this with our team and keep you posted!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: DOW: monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again,

Matias here!

I heard back from the team.

They confirmed that for the itemsValues (Item mapping) data to go from the trigger you mention to a custom action, you need to add a dynamic mapping custom field in your custom action (coming from the recipe sentence), and then you will be able to use that information to map the item. When the trigger gets triggered, your custom action’s endpoint will receive the data from the item.

Let me know if you have any questions about this!

Cheers,
Matias
